name: opencode-sessions
title: OpenCode Sessions
description: Browse, search, and manage your OpenCode sessions
author: mike182uk

commands.name: search-sessions
commands.title: Search Sessions
commands.subtitle: OpenCode
commands.description: Browse sessions with search, see active status, resume in terminal

commands.name: new-session
commands.title: New Session
commands.subtitle: OpenCode
commands.description: Start a fresh OpenCode conversation in any project directory

preferences.name: terminal
preferences.title: Terminal
preferences.description: Terminal application to open OpenCode sessions in. Auto-detect picks the first running terminal.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
